questions.prompt: Which is the correct reflexive pronoun for 'yo'?
questions.explanation: Me is the reflexive pronoun for yo (I). Me despierto = I wake up.
For ustedes, -ar verbs take -an: trabajan. This is the standard plural you form in Mexico.

questions.prompt: How do you say 'I go to bed at eleven'?
questions.explanation: Me acuesto = I go to bed (reflexive). A las once = at eleven.

questions.prompt: What time is the main meal (la comida) typically eaten in Mexico?
questions.explanation: La comida, the main meal, is typically eaten between 2-4pm in Mexico — later than in most other countries.
Primero = first, luego = then/afterwards. They describe the sequence of a routine.

questions.prompt: Which sentence correctly says 'You (informal) study every day'?
questions.explanation: Tú form of estudiar is estudias. Todos los días = every day.
Por la tarde = in the afternoon. Por la mañana = in the morning. Por la noche = at night.
Desayunar = to have breakfast. Almorzar = to have lunch. Cenar = to have dinner.
